class.name: AutoworkE2EConfig
class.brief_description: Configuration provider for the Autowork End-to-End WebSocket framework.
class.description: This class parses the [code]--aw-e2e[/code] environment configuration injected from the command line, exposing it globally for the testing servers to resolve port assignments and authentication keys.

method.name: get_host
method.description: Returns the host address currently assigned to the E2E instance. By default, this is dynamically determined unless explicitly overridden.

method.name: get_port
method.description: Returns the TCP/WebSocket port the orchestrator is demanding. Configurable via [code]--aw-e2e-port[/code].

method.name: get_port_file
method.description: Returns the absolute location of the ephemeral [code].port[/code] file if the orchestrator requested file-based port acquisition over standard stdout parsing.

method.name: get_token
method.description: Returns the secure runtime token (shared HMAC key) that client script orchestrators must provide inside their payloads for successful WebSocket handshakes. Configured via [code]--aw-e2e-token[/code].

method.name: is_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if Autowork E2E routing is fully initialized. Typically, this is achieved by either explicitly setting Project Settings or passing the [code]--aw-e2e[/code] command line parameter.

method.name: is_logging
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if granular socket and command dispatch logging output is permitted to print into the [code]stdout[/code] log file. Triggered via [code]--aw-e2e-log[/code].
